[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../index.md) / transport/http/http-transport

# transport/http/http-transport

> **Transport Layer**

Streamable HTTP transport — raw `node:http` server with Effect-managed
lifecycle, stateful MCP session management, a health endpoint, and DNS
rebinding protection.

## Remarks

This module replaces the former Express-based transport with a plain
[node:http.createServer](https://nodejs.org/api/) implementation.  Active
MCP sessions are tracked in an Effect [Ref](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) holding a
[TransportMap](#) (session-ID → transport).  The map is populated on
`initialize` requests and pruned on explicit `DELETE /mcp` terminations
or transport `onclose` callbacks.  All entries are drained during
graceful shutdown via [HttpServerHandle.close](interfaces/HttpServerHandle.md#property-close).

Exposed endpoints:

| Method    | Path      | Purpose                             |
| --------- | --------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `GET`     | `/health` | Liveness probe (`{ status: "ok" }`) |
| `POST`    | `/mcp`    | Primary MCP message ingress         |
| `GET`     | `/mcp`    | SSE backward-compatibility stream   |
| `DELETE`  | `/mcp`    | Explicit session termination        |
| `OPTIONS` | `*`       | CORS preflight                      |

## Interfaces

| Interface                                          | Description                                                                                                                                                          |
| -------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [HttpServerHandle](interfaces/HttpServerHandle.md) | Handle returned by [startHttpServer](functions/startHttpServer.md) for lifecycle control of the underlying `node:http` server and its active MCP session transports. |

## Functions

| Function                                        | Description                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ----------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [startHttpServer](functions/startHttpServer.md) | Creates and starts a raw `node:http` server wired to the MCP Streamable HTTP transport, returning an [HttpServerHandle](interfaces/HttpServerHandle.md) for lifecycle control. |
